novelty: Grand summary of 30 v5.2 deep analysis waves covering 12 therapeutic areas

Severity-Sex Gradient.significance: Monotonic decline confirms women face more severe drug reactions

GLP-1 RA Male Bias.significance: Most-prescribed drug class of 2024-25 has near-universal male bias in safety signals

CGRP Antibody 74pp Paradox.significance: Same target (CGRP), opposite sex-bias. Migraines 3:1 female

MS Drug Male Bias.significance: MS 2-3x more common in women, but MS drugs heavily male-biased

TZD Near-Universal Female Bias.significance: Thiazolidinediones = most female-biased drug class overall

FQ Organ Paradox.finding: FQ tendon/MSK 10.5%F but FQ CNS effects 73.3%F
FQ Organ Paradox.significance: Same drug class, organ-dependent sex-bias reversal

Oncology Cardiotoxicity 86%F.significance: Women face much higher cardiotoxicity risk from cancer therapy

Corticosteroid Psychiatric 92%F.significance: Corticosteroid psychiatric side effects overwhelmingly affect women

Cross-Class 77pp Spread.finding: TZDs 91.7%F to S1P modulators 14.5%F across 27 drug classes
Cross-Class 77pp Spread.significance: Drug class is a major determinant of sex-differential safety

NSAID Organ Paradox.significance: Within same drug class, organ-dependent sex-bias reversal

Opioid Female Predominance.significance: Female patients more vulnerable to opioid respiratory depression

CPI Hepatotoxicity 100%F.significance: Checkpoint inhibitor liver toxicity exclusively female

Clinical Trial Sex Gap.finding: 466 drugs with strong sex-bias, 452 with ZERO trials
Clinical Trial Sex Gap.significance: Massive unmet need for sex-stratified clinical trials
